creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
Also, it appears that my apache was segfaulting on retrieve, I've recompiled it and it's now serving the file:

===>  License lsof accepted by the user
===>   lsof-4.90.b,8 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> lsof_4.90B.freebsd.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.cerias.purdue.edu/pub/tools/unix/sysutils/lsof/lsof_4.90B.freebsd.tar.bz2
fetch: http://ftp.cerias.purdue.edu/pub/tools/unix/sysutils/lsof/lsof_4.90B.freebsd.tar.bz2: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.lerctr.org/lsof/lsof_4.90B.freebsd.tar.bz2
lsof_4.90B.freebsd.tar.bz2                    100% of  474 kB  532 kBps 00m01s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by lsof-4.90.b,8 for building
borg.lerctr.org /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof $ ^DConnection to borg-home closed.
